Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension

Class PriorityMediator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.extension.PriorityMediator
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPriorityMediator
public class PriorityMediator extends Object implements IPriorityMediator

  • Constructor Details

    • PriorityMediator

      public PriorityMediator(AbstractGrammar grammar)

  • Method Details

    • addPriority

      public void addPriority(String lowOpId, String highOpId) throws CycleError
      Description copied from interface: IPriorityMediator
      Adds a priority between the two operators with the given ids.

      Both operators must belong to the same operator group.

      lowOpId operator gets a lower priority than highOpId operator.

      Stating that operator op1 has lower priority than operator op2 means that:

    • a op1 b op2 c is parsed a op1 (b op2 c)
    • a op2 b op1 c is parsed (a op2 b) op1 c
    • parentheses are required for parsing (a op1 b) op2 c and a op2 (b op1 c)

      • Specified by:
      addPriority in interface IPriorityMediator
      Parameters:
      lowOpId - an operator id
      highOpId - an operator id
      Throws:
      CycleError - if adding the given priority introduces a cycle

    • addGroupPriority

      public void addGroupPriority(String lowGroupId, String highGroupId) throws CycleError
      Description copied from interface: IPriorityMediator
      Adds a priority between groups of given ids.

      lowGroupId group gets a lower priority than highGroupId group.

      Stating that group gr1 has lower priority than group gr2 means that every operator in gr1 has lower priority than any operator in gr2.

      Specified by:
      addGroupPriority in interface IPriorityMediator
      Parameters:
      lowGroupId - a group id
      highGroupId - a group id
      Throws:
      CycleError - if adding the given priority introduces a cycle
